backlog.completion_criteria: Mark supported when project translation can resolve, report, validate, and either forward or explicitly reject configured include paths and discovered include dependencies for every supported source backend without backend-specific hidden state.
backlog.current_gap: Include directories and discovered direct or nested include dependencies are reported, simple conditional include branches are evaluated with project and variant defines, recursive include cycles and resolved include read failures are diagnosed, and include-path forwarding is covered across every registered source frontend as forwarded or explicitly not-supported; system include behavior and backend-native include semantics remain backend-dependent.
backlog.next_scope: Add backend-native semantic coverage for system includes and translated, preserved, or rejected include forms for each source frontend.
backlog.notes: The project pipeline records include directories, records per-include directory status records and status counts, validates current include-directory resolved paths with expected/actual include-directory status, resolved-path, and frontend-visibility validation context, rejects unexpected generated include-directory status fields, reports missing include directories, reports include entries that resolve to files or other non-directory paths, reports include directories that resolve outside the repository, recursively scans #include directives into per-unit includeDependencies records, ignores block-commented preprocessor directives while still recognizing directives after same-line block comments with optional nested source paths while honoring simple #if, #ifdef, #ifndef, #elif, #else, and #endif branches with project and variant defines, including defined checks, boolean operators, parentheses, integer and boolean define values, and simple integer comparisons, local, system, or dynamic kind, line and column, resolved, missing, system, dynamic, or outside-project status, repository-relative resolved paths, resolved include SHA-256 hashes and byte sizes, source/include-dir resolution source, and project-define plus variant provenance for define-backed include targets, emits structured diagnostics for missing local, dynamic, outside-project, and cyclic include directives with project-define and variant provenance, including structured variant fields and diagnostic variant rollups for missing, dynamic, and cyclic include diagnostics when applicable, validates include dependency record shape including unexpected generated include dependency fields, summary rollups including source-backend, source-backend status, resolution-source, and variant counts, missing current include-scan diagnostics, missing include dependency summary rollups, missing and extra current-scan dependency records, current status, resolved path, resolved include hash, resolved include size, expected/actual include status, path, source, hash, and byte-size mismatch context, source/include-dir resolution source, project-define plus variant include provenance, and current-scan mismatch labels include resolved path, resolution source, and project-define provenance, applies CLI include-directory overrides with normalized repository-relative separators and rejects empty CLI include-directory overrides, passes only active existing repository-contained resolved paths to source frontends that expose include-path preprocessor options, resolves CrossGL quoted includes relative to the current source file and configured include paths, applies named-variant define maps and project include directories to OpenGL/GLSL translation with a resolved angle include and variant-specific conditional output, preserves unresolved CrossGL includes for reporting and downstream handling, rejects CrossGL include cycles, records each artifact include-path processing status (forwarded, not-requested, or not-supported) with source frontend support metadata, verifies include-path forwarding metadata for every registered source frontend, emits warning diagnostics and missing-capability rollups when active include paths cannot be forwarded by a source frontend, and includes include-path processing rollups by status, target, source backend, and variant, reports resolved include read failures with project.scan.include-read-failed diagnostics while preserving the already discovered include dependency, validates malformed or forged artifact include-path processing metadata including unexpected generated processing fields and include-path processing summary rollup mismatches including target and variant rollups, missing include-path processing target and variant rollups, and text inspection identifies inactive include directories by path, resolved path, and frontend visibility, include dependency status, kind, source-backend, source-backend status, resolution-source, variant, and include-path processing rollups by status, target, source backend, and variant, resolved include dependency samples, system include dependency samples, and unresolved include dependency samples with source-backend labels, project-define provenance, variant names, unit source hash and byte-size metadata, and resolved include hash and byte-size metadata, sampled include-path processing artifact metadata, and include-path processing inspection summaries include configured include-directory status records plus frontend-visible and inactive directory counts. It applies named-variant define maps and project include directories to DirectX/HLSL and Metal/MSL project translation with resolved local headers and variant-specific conditional output, Slang project translation with resolved local headers and variant-specific conditional output, Vulkan project translation with a resolved angle include and variant-specific conditional output, and to CUDA/HIP project translation with unresolved runtime system includes, resolved local headers, and variant-specific conditional output. Include semantics remain backend-dependent, so this remains partial project support. Resolved include dependency reports and inspection samples include byte-size metadata.

features.description: Discover registered shader and GPU source files across a repository without assuming a single source backend.
features.name: Repository source discovery

cuda.notes: The project scanner discovers registered shader/GPU source files across configured source roots, includes configured and CLI source override patterns during default discovery, applies repository-relative explicit include and source override patterns from the repository root before source-root visibility filtering, records unsupported explicit includes, records extensionless unsupported explicit includes in skipped-extension rollups with source.discovery diagnostics, records known unsupported shader artifacts and source formats with specific scan diagnostics, reports invalid roots, records source-root status counts with expected/actual source-root status, resolved-path, and scan-visibility validation context, rejects unexpected generated source-root status fields, records scan/report CLI source-root overrides and source override rollups, validation rejects missing scan summary rollups, rejects reports that omit currently scanned units or skipped sources, rejects roots that resolve to non-directory paths, and reports non-repository-relative include, source override, and exclude patterns that leave valid units visible, including drive-qualified Windows paths, resolves explicit relative config paths from the repository root with normalized repository-relative separators and rejects missing explicit config paths, normalizes repository-relative source-root, include-pattern, exclude-pattern, source-override, include-directory, output-directory, external-corpus manifest, and CLI source-root, include-directory, and source-override separators while preserving drive-qualified paths for outside-project diagnostics, rejects malformed project configuration scalar, list, and source override metadata before scan, reports unsupported source override backends even when no files match, validates skipped source override provenance with expected/actual source override provenance mismatch context, rejects unexpected generated unit and skipped record fields, text inspection identifies inactive source roots by path, resolved path, and scan visibility, and makes scan/report CLI commands exit nonzero when the generated report contains error diagnostics.

features.description: Carry project include-directory intent into repo-scale translation planning.
features.name: Project include resolution

cuda.completion_criteria: Mark supported when project translation can resolve, report, validate, and either forward or explicitly reject configured include paths and discovered include dependencies for every supported source backend without backend-specific hidden state.
cuda.current_gap: Include directories and discovered direct or nested include dependencies are reported, simple conditional include branches are evaluated with project and variant defines, recursive include cycles and resolved include read failures are diagnosed, and include-path forwarding is covered across every registered source frontend as forwarded or explicitly not-supported; system include behavior and backend-native include semantics remain backend-dependent.
cuda.next_scope: Add backend-native semantic coverage for system includes and translated, preserved, or rejected include forms for each source frontend.
cuda.notes: The project pipeline records include directories, records per-include directory status records and status counts, validates current include-directory resolved paths with expected/actual include-directory status, resolved-path, and frontend-visibility validation context, rejects unexpected generated include-directory status fields, reports missing include directories, reports include entries that resolve to files or other non-directory paths, reports include directories that resolve outside the repository, recursively scans #include directives into per-unit includeDependencies records, ignores block-commented preprocessor directives while still recognizing directives after same-line block comments with optional nested source paths while honoring simple #if, #ifdef, #ifndef, #elif, #else, and #endif branches with project and variant defines, including defined checks, boolean operators, parentheses, integer and boolean define values, and simple integer comparisons, local, system, or dynamic kind, line and column, resolved, missing, system, dynamic, or outside-project status, repository-relative resolved paths, resolved include SHA-256 hashes and byte sizes, source/include-dir resolution source, and project-define plus variant provenance for define-backed include targets, emits structured diagnostics for missing local, dynamic, outside-project, and cyclic include directives with project-define and variant provenance, including structured variant fields and diagnostic variant rollups for missing, dynamic, and cyclic include diagnostics when applicable, validates include dependency record shape including unexpected generated include dependency fields, summary rollups including source-backend, source-backend status, resolution-source, and variant counts, missing current include-scan diagnostics, missing include dependency summary rollups, missing and extra current-scan dependency records, current status, resolved path, resolved include hash, resolved include size, expected/actual include status, path, source, hash, and byte-size mismatch context, source/include-dir resolution source, project-define plus variant include provenance, and current-scan mismatch labels include resolved path, resolution source, and project-define provenance, applies CLI include-directory overrides with normalized repository-relative separators and rejects empty CLI include-directory overrides, passes only active existing repository-contained resolved paths to source frontends that expose include-path preprocessor options, resolves CrossGL quoted includes relative to the current source file and configured include paths, applies named-variant define maps and project include directories to OpenGL/GLSL translation with a resolved angle include and variant-specific conditional output, preserves unresolved CrossGL includes for reporting and downstream handling, rejects CrossGL include cycles, records each artifact include-path processing status (forwarded, not-requested, or not-supported) with source frontend support metadata, verifies include-path forwarding metadata for every registered source frontend, emits warning diagnostics and missing-capability rollups when active include paths cannot be forwarded by a source frontend, and includes include-path processing rollups by status, target, source backend, and variant, reports resolved include read failures with project.scan.include-read-failed diagnostics while preserving the already discovered include dependency, validates malformed or forged artifact include-path processing metadata including unexpected generated processing fields and include-path processing summary rollup mismatches including target and variant rollups, missing include-path processing target and variant rollups, and text inspection identifies inactive include directories by path, resolved path, and frontend visibility, include dependency status, kind, source-backend, source-backend status, resolution-source, variant, and include-path processing rollups by status, target, source backend, and variant, resolved include dependency samples, system include dependency samples, and unresolved include dependency samples with source-backend labels, project-define provenance, variant names, unit source hash and byte-size metadata, and resolved include hash and byte-size metadata, sampled include-path processing artifact metadata, and include-path processing inspection summaries include configured include-directory status records plus frontend-visible and inactive directory counts. It applies named-variant define maps and project include directories to DirectX/HLSL and Metal/MSL project translation with resolved local headers and variant-specific conditional output, Slang project translation with resolved local headers and variant-specific conditional output, Vulkan project translation with a resolved angle include and variant-specific conditional output, and to CUDA/HIP project translation with unresolved runtime system includes, resolved local headers, and variant-specific conditional output. Include semantics remain backend-dependent, so this remains partial project support. Resolved include dependency reports and inspection samples include byte-size metadata.

features.description: Translate discovered project units to one or more target backends while preserving repository-relative output paths.
features.name: Batch project translation

cuda.notes: The project pipeline batches discovered units through the existing single-file translator, normalizes duplicate explicit targets, rejects empty CLI target overrides, applies source backend overrides and command-scoped source-root overrides, preserves repository-relative target and variant output paths, refuses to write artifacts outside the repository, records unsupported target diagnostics and per-artifact failures, records artifact matrix emitted, translated, failed, missing, extra, and completion counts with target and variant rollups, and has real translator coverage for multiple units, all supported target backends, and variants. External corpus coverage is tracked separately from core batch translation support.

External corpus coverage is tracked separately from core batch translation support.

External corpus coverage is tracked separately from core batch translation support.

features.description: Emit structured manual follow-up actions for repo-porting work outside shader and kernel source translation.
features.name: Migration action report

cuda.notes: Project reports emit documented manual-runtime-integration actions when supported translation units and target backends are present, emit documented manual-include-resolution actions for unresolved system include dependencies, omit unsupported scan targets, scope translation-report actions to targets with translated artifacts, emit action count and kind, severity, target, and runtime-reference rollups, expose bounded inspection samples with target lists and truncation metadata, include runtime-reference count, backend, kind, and path rollups in reports and inspection output, expose bounded runtime-reference samples in report inspection, surface runtime-reference rollups and samples in CLI inspection text, and validation rejects altered migration non-goals, missing or altered action rollups, noncanonical or duplicate action targets, empty action targets, action targets without translated artifacts, action targets that are not declared by the report, and malformed runtime-reference records. Runtime-reference records identify detected host or build-file symbols by repository-relative path, line, column, backend, kind, and symbol while keeping host runtime integration as a manual follow-up. The action message separates shader/kernel source translation from host runtime APIs, resource binding setup, build scripts, and backend framework integration.

features.description: Inspect existing project portability reports as concise JSON, text, or SARIF summaries for triage and migration planning.
features.name: Project report inspection

cuda.notes: Project report inspection exposes JSON, text, and SARIF summaries with inspection identity, SARIF invocation metadata, and source report schema/kind and hash metadata, source report generation metadata, a closed inspection-report field set for generated portability reports, unavailable optional sections marked with available=false, validation results, failed-artifact variant labels, configurable diagnostic and failed-artifact truncation metadata with negative sample-limit rejection, invalid-report markers, diagnostic location, target, and missing-capability context in text output, report diagnostic-code and missing-capability rollups, report source-backend, source-extension, source-override mappings and rollups, skipped-reason, skipped-extension including extensionless skipped-extension rollups in text inspection output, skipped source-override, sampled skipped-source paths with reason, extension, and source-override metadata, and artifact target rollups, validation status, diagnostic-code, missing-capability, toolchain-status, toolchain-run target, source-backend, check-kind, tool, and variant rollups plus artifact target, source-backend, and variant rollups, bounded source-map, source-remap, provenance, define-processing, include-path-processing, include-dependency, validation artifact, validation toolchain-run, runtime-reference, and skipped-source samples with custom limits, invalid toolchain-run command omission, failure-reason samples for failed toolchain runs, and truncation metadata, source-map count, source-map artifact samples, source-remap artifact samples with sidecar hash metadata, failed validation metadata in JSON and text samples, and provenance rollups, artifact matrix completion counts and target, source-backend, and variant rollups with report-or-translation-artifact-derived metadata source, text inspection of artifact-matrix source provenance, does not derive artifact-matrix gaps for scan-only reports, plus sampled missing and extra artifact identities, external-corpus rollups and sampled missing or undiscovered entries, scan-scope, project-config path, project root, output directory, project-config count, variant-name summaries, source-root status, include-directory status rollups, and include dependency status, kind, and resolution-source rollups plus unit source hash features.description: Emit machine-readable translated artifact records with source, target, path, status, source hash, and generated artifact hash metadata.
features.name: Artifact manifest

cuda.notes: The portability report records report generation time, generator package version, a closed top-level report field set, and fixed generator/project/artifact metadata field sets including project status, unit, skipped, include dependency, artifact processing, hash, provenance, and source-remap metadata, and records discovered units with source hashes and byte sizes, scan-only artifactMatrix plans with expected target, source-backend, and variant rollups before artifact generation, translated artifactMatrix metadata including emitted target, source-backend, and variant completion rollups, and every attempted artifact with source backend, target backend, output path with target backend suffix, translation status, applied define map, source hash, source byte size, generated artifact hash, basic pipeline provenance, and failed records with error metadata for artifact writes blocked by invalid project output paths, and normalizes repository-relative output-directory separators before artifact planning. Validation rejects report output directories that resolve outside the project root, artifact source paths that are not repository-relative including drive-qualified Windows paths, artifact source, features.description: Record source provenance and source-map metadata for project reports.
features.name: Source provenance and source-map bridge

cuda.completion_criteria: Mark supported when generated reports validate file-level and fine-grained source maps or source-remap records for all translated artifacts, and inspection output surfaces actionable provenance without stale hashes.
cuda.current_gap: Project artifacts carry file-level source maps for generated artifacts, line-granularity source maps for line-preserving artifacts, compiler-compatible source-remap sidecars, and source-map rollups correctly account for non-file map granularity, but backend-generated line, statement, and token mappings are not implemented.
cuda.next_scope: Add backend-generated line, statement, or token mappings and validation checks for translated artifacts when backend pipelines expose enough span data.

features.description: Emit structured project diagnostics for scan, translation, and validation failures.
features.name: Project diagnostics

cuda.notes: Project diagnostics use compiler-compatible severity, code, message, location, target, source-backend, variant, and missing-capability fields plus optional originalLocation fields for remapped spans, and text output carries diagnostic location, original source location, target, and missing-capability context plus source-backend and variant context, including variant-scoped include resolution and active preprocessor diagnostics, while keeping per-artifact failures in the report. SARIF output keeps generated or validation spans as primary diagnostic locations and links original source locations as SARIF related locations when originalLocation is present. Scan/report CLI commands return nonzero when project reports contain error diagnostics; unsupported target names, known unsupported source/artifact extensions matched by explicit scans, and non-repository-relative include, source override, and exclude scan patterns including drive-qualified Windows paths are reported before validation, while non-forwarded define/include-path frontend options are translation-time warnings surfaced in report summaries, and comment-aware scan-time translation-unit and include-file #define/#undef shadowing warnings are surfaced in report summaries; validation rejects malformed preserved diagnostics, unexpected generated diagnostic fields, non-repository-relative diagnostic locations including optional originalLocation fields, inconsistent diagnostic location spans including originalLocation spans, or diagnostics whose targets are not declared by the report or noncanonical in full reports before copying them into validation output. Report summaries include contract-checked rollups by severity, diagnostic code, target, source backend, variant, and missing capability, validation reports expose the same diagnostic context rollups, and validation rejects missing diagnostic severity, code, target, source-backend, variant, and missing-capability summary rollups or inconsistent diagnostic summary rollups, including duplicate external corpus manifest entry warnings.

Scan/report CLI commands return nonzero when project reports contain error diagnostics; unsupported target names, known unsupported source/artifact extensions matched by explicit scans, and non-repository-relative include, source override, and exclude scan patterns including drive-qualified Windows paths are reported before validation, while non-forwarded define/include-path frontend options are translation-time warnings surfaced in report summaries, and comment-aware scan-time translation-unit and include-file #define/#undef shadowing warnings are surfaced in report summaries; validation rejects malformed preserved diagnostics, unexpected generated diagnostic fields, non-repository-relative diagnostic locations including optional originalLocation fields, inconsistent diagnostic location spans including originalLocation spans, or diagnostics whose targets are not declared by the report or noncanonical in full reports before copying them into validation output. Report summaries include contract-checked rollups by severity, diagnostic code, target, source backend, variant, and missing capability, validation reports expose the same diagnostic context rollups, and validation rejects missing diagnostic severity, code, target, source-backend, variant, and missing-capability summary rollups or inconsistent diagnostic summary rollups, including duplicate external corpus manifest entry warnings.

features.description: Track repository-scale coverage against external shader and GPU source corpora.
features.name: External corpus coverage

cuda.notes: Project reports can attach a non-empty repository-relative external corpus manifest, skip malformed or duplicate manifest entries with structured diagnostics, and summarize declared valid paths, present and missing entries, discovered translation units, source-backend, target, and artifact rollups for manifest-backed project runs. Validation checks entry presence/discovery/source-backend consistency, normalized target lists, commit hash and source URL provenance consistency, and required manifest accounting, and text inspection surfaces the same rollups plus sampled missing and present-but-undiscovered entries with retained repository, commit, and source URL provenance metadata and configurable inspection sample limits. A pinned Slang reduced fixture participates in a manifest-backed project translation run. The pinned reduced-corpus manifest includes a focused CUDA reduction covered by backend fixture tests. This is a coverage and accounting layer only: CrossTL does not clone upstream repositories, run native build systems, or claim whole-corpus semantic parity from reduced backend fixtures.
